questions.explanation: At 13,700 feet, Nyoma is one of the world's highest airfields, providing a significant tactical advantage near the LAC.

questions.question: The 'INS Aridaman' is India's second:
questions.explanation: INS Aridaman is the second SSBN of the Arihant class, strengthening the sea-based leg of India's nuclear triad.

questions.question: The 'SPADEX' mission, conducted by ISRO in early 2026, demonstrated the capability of:

options.A: Lunar soft landing on the far side

questions.explanation: SPADEX (Space Docking Experiment) demonstrated two satellites docking in orbit, a crucial technology for modular space station construction.

questions.question: The 'Nagastra-2' is a high-altitude loitering munition. What is its unique 'soft-kill' recovery feature?

options.A: It can be recovered via parachute if the mission is aborted
options.B: It turns into a surveillance drone after impact
options.C: It can self-repair small wing damages
options.D: It dissolves in water to prevent capture

questions.explanation: Nagastra-2 is a 'Kamikaze' drone that can accurately strike, but if no target is engaged, it can be commanded to return and be recovered via parachute.

questions.question: The record capital outlay for Defense Modernization in the Union Budget 2026-27 was approximately:
questions.explanation: The 2026-27 Budget saw the capital outlay for the Ministry of Defence reach ₹2.1 lakh crore, focusing on advanced procurement under 'Make in India'.

questions.question: The 'Mission Divyastra-II' test conducted in May 2026 by DRDO specifically validated which capability for the Agni-V missile?

options.B: Multiple Independently Targetable Re-entry Vehicle (MIRV) technology

questions.explanation: Mission Divyastra-II is the second major flight test confirming MIRV technology, allowing one Agni-V to hit multiple targets with independent warheads.

questions.question: Which ISRO mission, scheduled for late 2026, is a collaboration with JAXA (Japan) to explore the lunar south pole for water ice?
questions.explanation: LUPEX is a joint mission where India provides the lander and Japan provides the rover to investigate the availability of water at the lunar pole.

questions.question: The Indian Navy's first squadron of 'MQ-9B SeaGuardian' High Altitude Long Endurance (HALE) drones, inducted in 2026, is based at which station?
questions.explanation: INS Rajali (Arakkonam) is the hub for long-range maritime reconnaissance and currently hosts the SeaGuardian drones.

questions.question: The 'IMEC' corridor, discussed during the 2026 G20 outreach, aims to link India to Europe via which primary transit region?
questions.explanation: The India-Middle East-Europe Economic Corridor (IMEC) utilizes a rail and sea link through the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Jordan, and Israel.

questions.question: The 'C-295' transport aircraft facility in Vadodara, which rolls out its first 'Made in India' unit in late 2026, is a partnership between Airbus and:
questions.explanation: This is the first time a private Indian company (Tata) is manufacturing a full military aircraft in the country.

questions.question: Which country took over the G20 Presidency from South Africa on December 1, 2025, leading the 2026 cycle?
questions.explanation: The United States holds the G20 presidency for 2026, returning leadership to North America.

questions.question: The indigenous Long Range Surface-to-Air Missile (LRSAM) system being developed under 'Project Kusha' is intended to provide protection up to what range?
questions.explanation: Project Kusha is India's equivalent of the S-400/Iron Dome, designed to intercept threats at ranges of 350 km.

questions.question: The 20th Asian Games (2026) are scheduled to be held in which country?
questions.explanation: The 2026 Asian Games (Aichi-Nagoya 2026) will be hosted by Japan.

questions.question: In early 2026, the Ministry of Defence officially notified the formation of the first 'Integrated Theatre Command'. Where is the headquarters of the 'Maritime Theatre Command' (MTC) located?
questions.explanation: The Maritime Theatre Command (MTC) is headquartered at Karwar, Karnataka (Project Seabird), designed to integrate all naval assets and coastal security elements under a single operational commander.

questions.question: Which European port has been designated as the primary gateway for the 'IMEC' (India-Middle East-Europe Economic Corridor) into the European mainland as of 2026?
questions.explanation: The Port of Piraeus in Greece is the key maritime-to-rail entry point for the corridor, connecting Indian goods to the European rail network.

questions.question: Who assumed the office of the Chief of the Army Staff (COAS) in early 2026, succeeding General Manoj Pande?
questions.explanation: General Upendra Dwivedi assumed the role of COAS in 2026, having previously served as the Vice Chief and the Northern Army Commander.

questions.question: Which indigenous light tank, specifically developed for high-altitude operations in regions like Ladakh, entered mass production in 2026?
questions.explanation: The Zorawar light tank was developed by DRDO and L&T to provide high mobility and firepower in mountainous terrain where heavy tanks struggle.

questions.question: Which country assumed the Presidency of the G20 for the calendar year 2026?
questions.explanation: The United States assumed the G20 presidency for 2026, following the tenure of South Africa in 2025.

questions.question: In the Union Budget 2026-27, which specific scheme was allocated record funding to foster innovation in defence through startups?
questions.explanation: iDEX received its highest-ever allocation to accelerate the development of indigenous technologies like loitering munitions and AI-driven surveillance.

questions.question: In early 2026, India issued a formal notice to Pakistan regarding the 'Indus Waters Treaty'. What is the primary modification India is seeking?

options.A: To stop all water flow to the Indus
options.B: To include China as a mediator
options.C: To modify the dispute resolution mechanism citing changed circumstances
options.D: To divert the Chenab river entirely

questions.explanation: India seeks to modify the 1960 treaty's dispute resolution mechanism (Article XII-3) to address issues like the Kishanganga and Ratle projects through a single legal channel.

questions.explanation: Nyoma Airfield in Eastern Ladakh is one of the highest airfields in the world, providing a critical tactical edge near the LAC.
